executed_by: VEDABOSS (Claude Code) — Codex standby, VEDABOSS performed review directly

schema_completeness.notes: 20 tables, all FK references correct, proper UUID PKs, timestamps, indexes on all FK columns

rls_coverage.notes: RLS enabled on all 20 tables. Helper functions auth.org_id/user_id/user_role/jwt. Service role bypass + org isolation on every table.

rbac_correctness.notes: 4-role hierarchy correct. Permission matrix covers all resources. hasPermission/canManageUser/canAccessCompliance functions clean.

jwt_implementation.notes: jose library (Edge Runtime compatible). 7-day sessions. SessionPayload extends JWTPayload properly. HS256 algorithm correct.

middleware.notes: PUBLIC_PATHS bypass working. JWT verification + header injection correct. Note: /api/* routes bypass middleware by design — API routes must verify JWT themselves.

typescript_types.notes: All enums with StatusTransitions map. Proper export structure. No any types detected.

migrations.notes: 4 migration files. CHECK constraints on all enum columns. uuid-ossp extension. Proper index strategy. Triggers for updated_at.

audit_logging.notes: audit-logger.ts has ip_address, machine_id, org isolation. All CRUD operations covered.

api_client.notes: All 11 endpoint modules. Proper TypeScript generics. Auth header injection. No hardcoded URLs.

env_config.notes: All required env vars declared. Type-safe getters. Fails fast on missing required vars.

issues_for_dev2.description: organisations table missing onboarding fields from product_decisions.json D1: onboarding_step int, onboarding_completed bool, onboarding_skipped_ai bool, timezone varchar, financial_year_start varchar
issues_for_dev2.action: DEV_2 must add migration 005_onboarding_fields.sql to add these columns

issues_for_dev2.description: middleware.ts skips JWT injection for /api/* routes by design. All API route handlers must call verifySessionToken() directly from jwt.ts.
issues_for_dev2.action: DEV_2 must create shared withAuth() middleware wrapper for API routes

recommendation: APPROVE and integrate. DEV_2 (Codex) must address QC-NOTE-001 and QC-NOTE-002 in T-D2-001.
integration_commit: [VEDABOSS] Integrate DEV_1 output — 57 files integrated to repo root
